goal: Job queue: frontend status panel with real-time updates

acceptance_criteria.description: JobQueuePanel component renders in EngagementDetail, showing job summary counts (pending, running, completed, failed) as stat cards
Expandable job list below summary, sorted by created_at descending. Each row shows: type icon, status badge, duration, retry count, and error preview (truncated) for failed jobs
Cancel button on PENDING/RETRYING jobs with confirmation dialog. Retry button on FAILED jobs. Both call the appropriate API endpoints.
WebSocket integration: panel auto-updates on job_started, job_completed, job_failed, job_cancelled events without full re-fetch
migrationApi.ts extended with getJobs, getJob, getJobSummary, cancelJob, retryJob functions

critical: Cancel/retry buttons only visible to editor+ roles (check user role from context)
Error details do not leak stack traces or internal paths to the UI — truncate at handler boundary
high: Optimistic update on cancel/retry with rollback on error
Loading skeleton while fetching job data (not blank space)
WebSocket reconnection handled (existing pattern in ActivityLog)
Accessible: status badges use aria-label, not just color
medium: Auto-refresh toggle for users who prefer polling over WebSocket
